meaning: n.激光;Light amplification by stimulated emission of radiation,激光器,应用量子效应产生相干光束的设备。
examples: She's had laser surgery on her eye.
The print quality of the new laser printer is superb.
Laser discs can store prodigious amounts of information.
An optical laser reads the transparency and creates a wobbly, out-of-tune, almost eerie-sounding keyboard effect.
Lucent An awfully close second for the owner of Bell Labs, inventor of the laser.
